description: Font presets for SPB text tool — racing, sponsor, and decorative fonts tuned for iRacing liveries and car graphics.

Racing Numbers.name: Bold Racing
Racing Numbers.good_for: Main car numbers — 2-3 digits, doors and roof. TV-readable at 200m.

Racing Numbers.name: Speed Italic
Racing Numbers.good_for: Dynamic action-feel numbers. Classic NASCAR slant.

Racing Numbers.name: Stencil Number
Racing Numbers.good_for: Military/tactical number plates, rally car doors.

Racing Numbers.name: Condensed Racer
Racing Numbers.good_for: Tall narrow car doors, 3-digit numbers, IMSA prototypes.

Racing Numbers.name: Block Fat
Racing Numbers.good_for: Super-heavy numbers, max contrast on chrome/mirror bases.

Racing Numbers.name: Geometric Zero
Racing Numbers.good_for: Sci-fi / Formula E aesthetic, modern LMP numbers.

Racing Numbers.name: Varsity Plate
Racing Numbers.good_for: American muscle, varsity racing, Camaro/Mustang schemes.

Sponsor Block.name: Clean Sans
Sponsor Block.good_for: Standard corporate sponsor block, legible at 100m.

Sponsor Block.name: Tech Sans
Sponsor Block.good_for: Technology partner sponsors, automotive brand names.

Sponsor Block.name: Corporate Bold
Sponsor Block.good_for: Logo-style sponsor marks, retro corporate feel.

Sponsor Block.name: Condensed Block
Sponsor Block.good_for: Tall narrow sponsor bars, rocker panels, side skirts.

Sponsor Block.name: Industrial Sans
Sponsor Block.family: DIN, DIN Next, Arial Narrow, sans-serif
Sponsor Block.good_for: Engineering / industrial sponsors, German manufacturer feel.

Sponsor Block.name: Humanist Sans
Sponsor Block.good_for: Friendly consumer-brand sponsors, hospitality, food & beverage.

Driver Name.name: Script Italic
Driver Name.family: Brush Script Std, Lucida Handwriting, cursive
Driver Name.good_for: Classic driver signature under roof window.

Driver Name.name: Name Plate Italic
Driver Name.good_for: Modern driver nameplate above door, NASCAR style.

Driver Name.name: Condensed Name
Driver Name.good_for: Tight name space on A-pillar or rear quarter.

Driver Name.name: Classic Serif
Driver Name.good_for: Traditional LeMans-era driver credit, vintage F1.

Driver Name.name: Modern Geometric
Driver Name.good_for: Contemporary clean driver name, Formula E / esports.

Driver Name.name: Bold Italic Display
Driver Name.good_for: High-impact name above door, short surnames.

Technical/Engineering.name: Mono Tech
Technical/Engineering.good_for: Tech specs, VIN placards, scrutineering labels.

Technical/Engineering.name: Industrial DIN
Technical/Engineering.good_for: German automotive engineering labels, license plate style.

Technical/Engineering.name: Data Display
Technical/Engineering.good_for: Telemetry overlays, sensor labels, dashboard decals.

Technical/Engineering.name: Mil Spec
Technical/Engineering.good_for: Military-inspired weight markings, fuel cap callouts.

Technical/Engineering.name: Terminal Mono
Technical/Engineering.good_for: Modern data labels, QR/barcode captions, tech sponsor.

Decorative Racing.name: Flame Display
Decorative Racing.good_for: Hot rod team names, flame-scheme liveries.

Decorative Racing.name: Chrome Slab
Decorative Racing.good_for: Slab-serif display for team logos, bold masthead feel.

Decorative Racing.name: Gothic Blackletter
Decorative Racing.family: Old English Text MT, UnifrakturMaguntia, serif
Decorative Racing.good_for: Heavy metal team names, classic custom culture.

Decorative Racing.name: Futurist Display
Decorative Racing.good_for: Sci-fi racing, Formula E, cyberpunk team branding.

Vintage Era.name: 60s Le Mans
Vintage Era.good_for: 1960s endurance racing, Ford GT40, Gulf liveries.

Vintage Era.name: 80s Retro Wave
Vintage Era.good_for: 1980s Group B rally, IMSA GTP, retrowave aesthetic.

Vintage Era.name: 90s Bold Sans
Vintage Era.good_for: 1990s touring car, DTM golden era, BTCC.

Vintage Era.name: Art Deco
Vintage Era.good_for: Pre-war Grand Prix, 1920s-30s land speed record cars.
